content.en:
When the second Origin Rule Robbery Crystal appeared, Ye Tian received the news relatively early, so he rushed to the scene as soon as possible, severely injured the three Supreme Ancestors, and finally snatched this Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

After snatching this Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, Ye Tian returned to the Haitian Holy Sect to observe this Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

"This is the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal!"

Ye Tian seriously comprehended the above rules, it was indeed the rule that belonged to the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, and it was the most primordial rule, comprehending the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal was naturally better and faster than cultivating in the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal contained a powerful Origin Power.

Ye Tian could sense that if he refined this Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, it would be enough to improve his cultivation a bit, and he could even refine the Supreme Ancestor Body.

However, compared to the benefits of creating a Supreme Ancestral Technique, a mere Origin Rule Robbery Crystal was nothing.

However, not everyone is able to create the Supreme Ancestral Technique.

For example, the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, for such a long time, is only a second-level supreme holy beast.

"This Origin Rule Robbery Crystal is more cost-effective to use in the future to comprehend and create the Supreme Ancestral Technique or to use it for the human race!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he sent the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal back to the Dark Forbidden Realm, passed through the hand of the Terran ancestor, passed through the door, and sent it to the ontology.

Next, every few years, the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth would give birth to an Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal.

However, he was unlucky later, and the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal was snatched away by other ancestors.

With the passage of time, the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth had given birth to a total of about thirty Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals.

"Only two of them were snatched!"

Ye Tian sighed.

He also wanted to snatch more Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, but once other Ancestors snatched the Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, they could send the Origin Rules Robbery Crystals back to the Exotic World as quickly as possible, and he couldn't chase them down.

After all, other exotic worlds have not yet reached the time of the great tribulation, if he pursues and kills the past, he will be directly wiped out by the exotic world.

Unless he was willing to copy the bodies of other foreign world powerhouses to chase and kill the past, it would expose his abilities, so it was not worth it.

However, among so many Supreme Ancestors, he was able to snatch two Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, which was already quite good.

He didn't leave any of these two Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, and all of them were returned to the hands of the Terran Body.

At this time, the Great Tribulation of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth had come to an advanced stage, except for the scope of the three holy sects, the other areas had become a void, there were no resources left, all of them were robbed, countless worlds were turned into pieces, and these creatures naturally all fell.

Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect.

The Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast was a little flustered at this time, because this time the Great Tribulation was too different from usual.

In the past, the True Emperors of the Blood Mist Alliance would collect resources on a large scale, and even at this time, they were already attacking the Three Great Holy Sects, and the Three Holy Sects had to unite with other foreign heaven and earth to balance the Blood Mist Alliance.

But now, the Blood Mist Alliance has hardly done anything, and even collecting resources has only sent a few Supreme True Emperors, which is not the style of the Blood Mist Alliance.

And after investigation, the Blood Mist Alliance's Blood Mist Forbidden Land was covered, and even the strongest powerhouses couldn't spy on it, and they didn't know what they were doing.

In such a situation, all the supreme-level exotic powerhouses knew that there were some problems with the Blood Mist Alliance, but the other exotic powerhouses were not worried, their forces were no longer in the Holy Realm, and it was a big deal to withdraw, and they were not afraid of the Blood Mist Alliance at all.

But the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect is afraid!

The Holy Realm Heaven and Earth is the foundation of the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect, and the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect can't run away at all.

"I hope that the Blood Mist Alliance is just a problem in the base camp, and this catastrophe has no strength to participate, not some conspiracy!"

The Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast said secretly.

However, not long after, a holy beast of the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Sect passed on the news that a large number of True Emperors of the Blood Mist Alliance were coming, and there were many of them that were extremely strong True Emperors.

Not long after the news came, there was no news of this holy beast, it was obviously discovered, and it was wiped out by the True Emperor of the Blood Mist Alliance.

......

One of the three holy sects of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, the Gilded Holy Sect.

This sect is a more powerful holy sect than the Haitian Holy Sect, with three supreme holy beasts, and there are many more other holy beasts than the Haitian Holy Sect.

But suddenly, many True Emperors of the Blood Mist Alliance came here, and everything was so abrupt that the Gilded Holy Sect didn't react.

Airplanes!!!!

Countless rays of light swept across the area occupied by the Sea and Sky Holy Sect, countless worlds were annihilated, countless living beings fell, and even many holy beasts did not have the slightest ability to resist, and they were killed in an instant.

If those ancestors in the Dark Forbidden Realm saw this scene, they would be in despair.

After all, the holy beast that was comparable to the combat power of the ancestor had also turned into an ant at this moment.

"Blood Mist Alliance, you're going too far!!!!"

The three supreme holy beasts of the Gilded Holy Sect said angrily.

They didn't want to fight with the Blood Mist Alliance, because they knew that they couldn't fight, but they rushed out of the encirclement with all their might, united with the Ten Thousand Beast Holy Sect, and then combined with other foreign forces, so that they could compete with the Blood Mist Alliance.

However, a large hand came across time and space, and grabbed one of the supreme holy beasts at once.

With a slight pinch, this supreme holy beast was pinched and exploded.

Of course, this Supreme Holy Beast still did not fall, but before he could fully heal and recover, another blow came, and this moment completely erased the traces of the life of the Supreme Holy Beast, completely erasing it from heaven and earth.

No resistance!

"The Third Level of the Supreme True Emperor !!"

The other two supreme holy beasts who were still alive said in despair.

He had never seen such a strong person, and the Blood Mist Alliance had never sent such a strong person before!

Why did such a strong person appear in the late stage of the Great Tribulation? This is not normal!

However, they could not escape.

Soon, they also died at the hands of the Blood Mist Alliance's third-level Supreme True Emperor, that is, the White Turtle True Emperor.

The Gilded Holy Sect was destroyed, and this news was naturally transmitted to the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect, as well as to the Sea and Sky Holy Sect.

At the first time, Ye Tian let all the powerhouses of the human race withdraw from the Haitian Forbidden Land, and then Ye Tian's copy body and the clone Heyuan Holy Beast evacuated the Haitian Holy Sect for the first time, and he abandoned the Haitian Holy Sect.

He knew very well that the Blood Mist Alliance had destroyed the Gilded Holy Sect in an instant, and the next target was likely to be the Sea and Sky Holy Sect.

He couldn't stand up to the Blood Mist Alliance, so he didn't want to lose his clone or his copy body.

The powerhouses of the Blood Mist Alliance were able to enter the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land through the gate, so the Terran naturally could not guard the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, and they had to evacuate so that there would be no losses.

I have to say that Ye Tian's choice is very clear.

Soon, the Blood Mist Alliance came to the Haitian Holy Sect and destroyed the Haitian Holy Sect with a wave of his hand.

And at this time, Ye Tian came to the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect.
